title: Trial of issues arising on motion to quash
doc_html:
Art. 537.  Trial of issues arising on motion to quash

All issues, whether of law or fact, that arise on a motion to quash shall be tried by the court without a jury.
doc_text:
Art. 537.  Trial of issues arising on motion to quash
All issues, whether of law or fact, that arise on a motion to quash shall be tried by the court without a jury.
